text: arXiv 2606.19298v1. Equation 1/e. Matched concepts: Number, Division, Variable. Number means a Number is a mathematical concept used as a named object, value, or quantity in formal mathematical discourse. Division means a Division is a mathematical operation or operator that transforms one or more inputs into a result. Variable means a Variable is a mathematical concept used as a named object, value, or quantity in formal mathematical discourse.
